title: ChroniteCore
description: A mod that adds a new material - Chronite! This mod doesn't have a creative tab so if you want to do something, you gonna have to do it yourself
body:
![why u lookin?](https://i.imgur.com/8rvAncj.png)

Chronite Core

chronitecore is a minecraft mod that is focused on adding a fun way to interact with blocks. Currently the mod is in the alpha stages (has a functional prototype), but it has the main feature of the mod. A resource called CHRONITE! This material can be Ionized and that will give it an ability to explode (explode it with tnt and the explosion will cause a chain reaction that will create an explosion similar to a nuke).

Upcoming Features:

- Custom sounds - A lot of new elements - Another way for creating a chain reaction that results in an explosion

DISCLAIMER

!THIS IS ONLY EARLY ALPHA OF THE MOD!

Features that you see now might not make it to the final version
